title: schmaltzia crenata
intro: Schmaltzia crenata, also known as the crested schmaltzia or crested stinkwood, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae. It is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal and economic properties. Schmaltzia crenata has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with these conditions and promote overall health and well-being.
